'''''Star Wars: Junior Jedi Knights''''' was a series of six young reader novels written between [[1995]] and [[1997]] by [[Nancy Richardson Fischer|Nancy Richardson]] and [[Rebecca Moesta]]. The novels are set in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]] and detail the adventures of [[Anakin Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]], the [[Kushiban]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ikrit]], and [[Uldir Lochett]]. The series was published by both [[Berkley Boulevard]] and [[Berkley Jam]].

==Continuity==
Published in the mid-1990s, the ''Junior Jedi Knights'' and [[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights|''Young Jedi Knights'']] series never use the term [[Padawan/Legends|''Padawan'']] for the apprentices studying at the [[Jedi Praxeum|academy]], as the word did not become common in lore until after ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace]]'' ([[1999]]). Instead, they are simply called “[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] students.”<ref name="TERC" />
